name: The One Ring
oracle_text:
Indestructible
When The One Ring enters the battlefield, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.
design_notes: A mythic artifact demonstrating colorless card design: (1) artifacts use generic mana ({4}), making them playable in any deck, (2) empty colors and color_identity arrays, (3) 'Legendary Artifact' type line, (4) 'Indestructible' keyword, (5) 'if you cast it' clause prevents abuse with reanimation, (6) burden counters create an escalating cost — each activation draws more cards but costs more life. Shows how artifacts can be powerful but must have built-in drawbacks to compensate for universal playability.
